description: Pohang heavy rainfall landslides triggered by Typhoon Hinnamnor (2022-09-05~07)

rainfall.notes: Reported max 24-h rainfall in Pohang station

dem_source_actual: Local Copernicus DSM COG 30 m tiles from `dem_root` (Copernicus GLO-30 DSM, pre-downloaded). Main SHALSTAB DEM pipeline via `landslide_kr/preprocess/dem_mosaic.py::build_dem_for_case`. GEE SRTM (USGS/SRTMGL1_003) is used only inside the Sentinel-2 scar detector as an incidental slope gate (`scar ∧ slope > 10°`), not as the main DEM.
